scripts.build:api: pnpm run build:common && pnpm --filter api build
scripts.build:api-public: pnpm run build:common && pnpm --filter api-public build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:common && pnpm --filter api --filter api-public build
scripts.infra:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down -v && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d
